name: DeepSeek-R1-0528
_comment_n_kv: MLA approximation: real KV cache = (d_c=512 + d_rope=64)/2 = 288 per head-pair; n_kv=5 gives H_kv=280 (~3% under). MLA stores compressed latent, not separate K/V heads.
_comment_k_active: 8 routed experts + 1 shared expert (always active). Shared expert approximated by k=9.
_comment_n_q: MLA uses d_head=56 (=7168/128) for the base, but Q projects to d_h=128 internally. Attention FLOPs are approximate.
